title: chromolaena plumeri
intro: Chromolaena plumeri, also known as Eupatorium or Fleabane, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and combat infections. The health benefits of Chromolaena plumeri include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Chromolaena plumeri is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and it is also used in folk medicine to treat various conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems.
